topic_id.description: ROS global topic path to read from. Use `"--list"` to list the available ROS topics

parameters.description: A list of parameters to read from the ROS node. Use `["--list"]` to get a list of available topics in the `topic-type-map` section

return_type.description: The return type for the response, defaults to JSON

tensorfleet-project-path.description: Tensorfleet project directory path. The directory should contain both .tensorfleet and .env files at its root

regex_filter.description: Regex filter to apply to the query
